# LAXMI — Italian Luxury Furniture Consulting

> Exclusive luxury Italian furniture consulting and boutique reselling. By appointment only. Based in Milan, Italy.

LAXMI is a luxury furniture consulting service specializing in authentic Made in Italy furniture. We offer personalized design consultations, curated collections from top Italian manufacturers, and a white-glove delivery experience.

## Services

- **Furniture Consulting**: One-on-one design consultations to select the perfect Italian furniture pieces for your space
- **Boutique Reselling**: A curated collection of premium Italian furniture from leading manufacturers
- **Interior Styling**: Complete styling services to bring your vision to life with Italian craftsmanship

## Key Information

- **Location**: Milan, Italy
- **Languages**: Italian, English
- **Booking**: By appointment only — request a consultation at https://www.thelaxmii.com/it/book
- **Contact**: thelaxmii07@gmail.com

## Brand

- **Tagline**: Crafted for connoisseurs. Made in Italy.
- **Price Range**: Premium / Luxury ($$$$)
- **Specialization**: Italian luxury furniture, kitchen design, interior consulting
